name: Aeolak
description: This unusual automatic rifle feels strangely familiar and has two fire modes. Primary fire packs radiation damage. Alternate fire charges up to launch an explosive projectile.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This unusual automatic rifle feels strangely familiar and has two fire modes. Primary fire packs radiation damage. Alternate fire charges up to launch an explosive projectile.

drops.location: Zariman Ten Zero (Level  110 - 115 Zariman Bounty), Rotation C

components.name: Thrax Plasm
components.description:
Found in the remnants of Thrax Void manifestations, this plasm has several surprisingly practical applications.

Location: Zariman

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Aeolak’s magazine getting stuck in hand if the reload animation gets interrupted.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.changes:
The Hespar and Aeolak Blueprints have also been split into separate Bounties, meaning these two rare rewards are now housed in their own independent Bounty table, instead of having both of them in one. 
Terminal Velocity is now compatible with the Aeolak.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Aeolak, Kuva Hek, and Euphona Prime not playing the proper reload animation when the last shot in the magazine is from its alt fire. 
Fixed Aeolak’s Riven disposition being 1.25 instead of 0.5.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being able to sell Aeolak components for Ducats.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.changes:
New Rifle: Aeolak 
Aeolak Blueprint (New Primary Rifle)
The Aeolak can be purchased via the in-game Market or earn its Blueprint through the Zariman Bounty rewards and its Component Blueprints in the endless Zariman mission rewards.
